stepSchemas.description: Sends a plain text WhatsApp message to a phone number via the turn.io API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: To
configFields.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +27821234567).

configFields.label: Message Body
configFields.description: Text content of the WhatsApp message.

outputs.description: Raw JSON response from the turn.io API.
Recipient phone number that was used.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Sends a media message (image, video, audio, or document) via the turn.io WhatsApp API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: To
configFields.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format.

configFields.label: Media Type
configFields.description: Type of media to send.

configFields.label: Media URL
configFields.description: Publicly accessible URL of the media file.

configFields.label: Caption
configFields.description: Optional caption text for the media message.

outputs.description: Raw JSON response from the turn.io API.
Recipient phone number that was used.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Sends a pre-approved WhatsApp message template via the turn.io API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: To
configFields.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format.

configFields.label: Template Name
configFields.description: Name of the approved message template.

configFields.label: Namespace
configFields.description: Template namespace (optional).

configFields.label: Language Code
configFields.description: BCP-47 language code for the template.

configFields.label: Components
configFields.description: Template component parameters (header, body, buttons) as JSON.

outputs.description: Raw JSON response from the turn.io API.
Recipient phone number that was used.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Sends an interactive WhatsApp message (buttons, lists, flows) via the turn.io API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: To
configFields.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format.

configFields.label: Interactive Payload
configFields.description: Interactive message payload object (type, header, body, footer, action).

outputs.description: Raw JSON response from the turn.io API.
Recipient phone number that was used.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Sends a location pin as a WhatsApp message via the turn.io API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: To
configFields.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format.

configFields.label: Longitude
configFields.description: Decimal longitude coordinate.

configFields.label: Latitude
configFields.description: Decimal latitude coordinate.

configFields.label: Location Name
configFields.description: Display name of the location.

configFields.label: Address
configFields.description: Street address of the location.

outputs.description: Raw JSON response from the turn.io API.
Recipient phone number that was used.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Lists WhatsApp messages, optionally filtered by contact, via the turn.io API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: Contact ID
configFields.description: Optional contact ID to filter messages for a specific contact.

outputs.description: Raw JSON list of messages from the turn.io API.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Checks whether one or more phone numbers are registered WhatsApp users via the turn.io API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: Contacts
configFields.description: List of phone numbers to check (E.164 format). Use this or 'phone', not both.

configFields.label: Phone
configFields.description: Single phone number to check (used when 'contacts' is not set).

configFields.label: Blocking Mode
configFields.description: Whether to wait for the result.

outputs.description: Raw JSON response with contact check results.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Uploads a list of phone numbers to turn.io for contact validation.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: Contacts
configFields.description: List of phone numbers in E.164 format to upload.

outputs.description: Raw JSON response from the turn.io API.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Updates the WhatsApp Business profile information via the turn.io API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: Profile Object
configFields.description: Full profile object to set. If provided, individual fields (description, email, address) are ignored.

configFields.label: Description
configFields.description: Business description (used when 'profile' is not set).

configFields.label: Email
configFields.description: Business email address (used when 'profile' is not set).

configFields.label: Address
configFields.description: Business address (used when 'profile' is not set).

outputs.description: Raw JSON response from the turn.io API.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Uploads a media file to turn.io for use in subsequent media messages.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: Media URL
configFields.description: Publicly accessible URL of the media to upload. Use this or file_data, not both.

configFields.label: File Data
configFields.description: Raw file data string for multipart upload (used when media_url is not set).

configFields.label: File Name
configFields.description: File name for the multipart upload.

configFields.label: MIME Type
configFields.description: MIME content type of the file (e.g. image/jpeg).

outputs.description: Raw JSON response containing the uploaded media ID.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Retrieves metadata for a previously uploaded media object via the turn.io API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: Media ID
configFields.description: ID of the media object to retrieve.

outputs.description: Raw JSON response with media metadata.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Deletes a previously uploaded media object from turn.io.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: Media ID
configFields.description: ID of the media object to delete.

outputs.description: True when the media was successfully deleted.
ID of the deleted media object.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Creates a new WhatsApp message template via the turn.io API for approval.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: Template Name
configFields.description: Unique name for the new message template.

configFields.label: Category
configFields.description: Template category.

configFields.label: Language Code
configFields.description: BCP-47 language code for the template.

configFields.label: Components
configFields.description: Template component definitions (header, body, footer, buttons) as JSON.

outputs.description: Raw JSON response with the created template details.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Lists all registered WhatsApp message templates via the turn.io API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

outputs.description: Raw JSON list of message templates.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Fetches the details of a specific WhatsApp message template by name via the turn.io API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: Template Name
configFields.description: Name of the template to fetch.

outputs.description: Raw JSON response with template details.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Updates an existing WhatsApp message template via the turn.io API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: Template Name
configFields.description: Name of the template to update.

configFields.label: Updates
configFields.description: Fields to update on the template as JSON object.

outputs.description: Raw JSON response with the updated template details.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Deletes a WhatsApp message template by name via the turn.io API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: Template Name
configFields.description: Name of the template to delete.

outputs.description: True when the template was successfully deleted.
Name of the deleted template.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Configures the turn.io webhook endpoint for receiving inbound WhatsApp messages.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: Webhook URL
configFields.description: HTTPS URL where turn.io should deliver inbound message events.

outputs.description: Raw JSON response from the turn.io API.
The configured webhook URL.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Creates a new WhatsApp Flow via the turn.io API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: Flow Name
configFields.description: Unique name for the WhatsApp Flow.

configFields.label: Description
configFields.description: Human-readable description of the flow.

configFields.label: Flow Steps
configFields.description: Flow step definitions as a JSON object.

outputs.description: Raw JSON response with the created flow details.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Lists all WhatsApp Flows registered in the turn.io account.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

outputs.description: Raw JSON list of WhatsApp Flows.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Sends a WhatsApp Flow to a contact as an interactive message via the turn.io API.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: To
configFields.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format.

configFields.label: Flow ID
configFields.description: ID of the WhatsApp Flow to send.

configFields.label: Call-to-Action Text
configFields.description: Button label that opens the flow (e.g. 'Start').

configFields.label: Flow Action
configFields.description: Action to perform when the flow opens (e.g. 'navigate').

configFields.label: Message Version
configFields.description: WhatsApp Flow message version number.

outputs.description: Raw JSON response from the turn.io API.
Recipient phone number that was used.
ID of the flow that was sent.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Lists all Journey automations configured in the turn.io account.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

outputs.description: Raw JSON list of journeys.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Triggers a turn.io Journey automation for a specific contact by phone number.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: Journey ID
configFields.description: ID of the journey to trigger.

configFields.label: Phone
configFields.description: Contact phone number in E.164 format.

configFields.label: Data
configFields.description: Optional key-value data to pass into the journey as context.

outputs.description: Raw JSON response from the turn.io API.
ID of the triggered journey.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Retrieves the conversation context data stored for a contact in turn.io.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: Contact ID
configFields.description: ID of the contact whose context to retrieve.

outputs.description: Raw JSON response containing the contact's context data.
ID of the contact.
Error message if the request failed.

stepSchemas.description: Updates the conversation context data stored for a contact in turn.io.

configFields.label: Module
configFields.description: Name of the turnio.provider module instance to use.

configFields.label: Contact ID
configFields.description: ID of the contact whose context to update.

configFields.label: Context Data
configFields.description: Key-value pairs to merge into the contact's context.

outputs.description: Raw JSON response from the turn.io API.
ID of the contact.
Error message if the request failed.
